text_blocks.text: The “arrow” syntax works only on struct pointers and dereferences a field.
struct Song* p_song = calloc(1, sizeof(struct Song));
free(p_song);  // Remember to free data when you are done!

text_blocks.text: Recall that typedef is what names types.

free(p_song);  // Remember to free data when you are done!
